name: Pizza Dough- for Chicago Style Bread Pizza
recipeIngredient: OR a mixture of white and whole wheat
1 package yeast or 1 tablespoon bulk dry yeast
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the seasonings, oil, and warm water.
2. Gradually add the flours to the mixture and knead until a smooth dough forms.
3. Allow the dough to rise for at least 30 minutes or longer to relax before spreading it in a large Chicago style pan or two flat pizza pans. Be sure to use the black pepper as it adds flavor.
4. For pesto crust, add 2-4 tablespoons of pesto with the oil. This makes a good dough in a bread machine on the dough setting.
5. Drizzle or brush a light coating of olive oil over the crust.
6. Add the tomato sauce and toppings.
7. Bake until just beginning to brown, then add the cheese. This will tend to make a less drippy sauce.
